line_items.description: Remove and dispose of existing vegetation and topsoil from 12m retaining-wall strip and 40m2 turf area. Includes green-waste tip fees.
Supply and install treated-pine sleeper retaining wall, 12m long × 400mm high, including 75mm concrete footing, 20MPa concrete, galvanised posts at 1.5m centres, drainage gravel & geofabric.
Supply and spread premium garden soil to 100mm depth over 40m2, level and fine-grade ready for turf.
Supply and lay Sir Walter Buffalo instant turf (incl. 5% wastage) over 40m2, including starter fertiliser and initial water-in.
Supply and plant 5 advanced Lilly Pilly ‘Resilience’ 300mm pots, including staking, root-starter and mulch ring.
Supply and spread premium organic mulch to garden beds at 75mm depth (approx 3m3 incl 10% wastage).
Labour — site prep & excavation (1 day), retaining-wall build (1.5 days), soil prep, turf & planting (0.5 day). 2-person crew, 3 days total × $680/day per person.

notes: Quote assumes clear front-yard access for 2-person crew and standard soil conditions. Retaining-wall height taken as 400mm (typical garden-bed). No council approval required under 1m height. Final turf quantity to be confirmed on site.
terms: Payment due within 14 days of acceptance. 50% deposit required to book start date. Balance payable on completion. Any rock, services or unforeseen excavation extras will be charged as variations at cost + 20%. All waste disposal and materials compliance fees included.
